narrative:
Stonelick Twp township has 4,153 registered voters, with 50.2% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 37.9% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 11.8%, a pronounced Republican lean of 26.1 percentage points.
